children.heading: Archaeological resource
children.label: 1 Archaeological resource
children.text: The term “archaeological resource” means an archaeological resource (as defined in ) that is Native American.section 470bb of title 16

children.heading: Cultural affiliation
children.label: 2 Cultural affiliation
children.text: The term “cultural affiliation” means that there is a relationship of shared group identity that can be reasonably traced historically or prehistorically between a present day Indian Tribe or Native Hawaiian organization and an identifiable earlier group.

children.heading: Cultural item
children.label: 3 Cultural item
children.text: The term “cultural item” means any 1 or more cultural items (as defined in section 2 of the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act ()).25 U.S.C. 3001

children.heading: Indian Tribe
children.label: 4 Indian Tribe
children.text: The term “Indian Tribe” has the meaning given the term “Indian tribe” in section 2 of the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act ().25 U.S.C. 3001

children.label: i
children.text: , as added by the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act ( et seq.); orsection 1170(b) of title 1825 U.S.C. 3001

children.label: ii
children.text: any other Federal law or treaty; and

children.label: i
children.text: subsections (b) and (c) of ; orsection 470ee of title 16

children.label: ii
children.text: any other Federal law or treaty.

children.heading: Exclusion
children.label: B Exclusion
children.text: The term “Item Requiring Export Certification” does not include an item described in clause (i) or (ii) of subparagraph (A) for which an Indian Tribe or Native Hawaiian organization with a cultural affiliation with the item has provided a certificate authorizing exportation of the item.

children.label: A
children.text: Native American (as defined in section 2 of the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act ()); and25 U.S.C. 3001

children.heading: Native Hawaiian organization
children.label: 8 Native Hawaiian organization
children.text: The term “Native Hawaiian organization” has the meaning given the term in section 2 of the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act ().25 U.S.C. 3001

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 9 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.

children.label: B
children.text: culturally, historically, or archaeologically significant objects, resources, patrimony, or other items that are affiliated with a Native American culture.
